theme_and_archetype.domain: Mobility, Logistics, and Travel Super App
theme_and_archetype.reasoning: Mobility apps require extreme clarity, high contrast for outdoor legibility, and a dense hierarchy for data (Swiss). The premium, Apple-level vibe requested demands deep tones, crisp typography, and sophisticated glassmorphism (Luxury).

brand_identity.name: RK POOJA
brand_identity.vibe: Uber-Level Quality, Ola-Level Simplicity, Apple-Level Design

font_families.mono: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace (for codes, OTPs, license plates)

layout_and_spacing.strategy: High Density for Dashboards, Bottom-Heavy & Reachable for Mobile Apps

mobile_app.grid: Bento Grid Protocol (Control Room) - Tight (gap-4) for service selector grid.
mobile_app.bottom_sheet: Primary interaction pattern for maps. Use framer-motion for smooth dragging.
mobile_app.safe_areas: Generous padding at bottom (pb-24) to avoid OS home bars.

dashboards.grid: Strict 12-column grid. Dense metrics. Cardless UI with 1px solid borders.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: p-1, p-2, p-4, p-6, p-8, p-12. Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6).
layout_and_spacing.radius: Subtle roundness. Dashboards (max 8px). Mobile App Bottom Sheets (rounded-t-3xl).

buttons.primary: Solid #0A2E6D (Light Mode) or #FFFFFF (Dark Mode). Hover state: lighter hue, text-white. Full width on mobile.
buttons.accent: Solid #FF7A00 for primary action like 'Confirm Ride'. Pulse animation for live matching.

cards_and_surfaces.mobile_map_overlay: Glassmorphism (The 'Crystal' Variant). backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 (light) or bg-black/60 (dark). 1px delicate inner stroke.
cards_and_surfaces.dashboard_widgets: Neumorphism/Tactile variants avoided. Use Flat Solid with 1px border-border and no shadow.
cards_and_surfaces.service_tiles: Flat background, 1px subtle border, sharp or slightly rounded (8px). On hover/tap: border-accent and slight lift.

inputs.style: Large touch targets (h-14 on mobile). Solid fill background (bg-muted/50), no border until focused (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent).

icons.style: Stroke width 2.0. Clean, recognizable. Used extensively in service grids.

motion_and_interactions.principles: Frictionless, familiar, brand-distinct. Micro-interactions for feedback.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Slide up for new sheets, fade for tab changes.
motion_and_interactions.live_tracking: Smooth interpolation for vehicle movement on map. Pulsing ring around user location.
motion_and_interactions.loading: Skeleton loaders matching the shape of content. No generic spinners for main content.

testing.requirements: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="confirm-booking-button"`).

media_and_assets.guidelines: Use high-quality assets. Avoid generic placeholders.

vehicle_3d_assets.description: Premium 3D isometric illustration of a sleek modern electric sedan car and an auto rickshaw. Use for service selector tiles or hero marketing.

map_ui_dark.description: Minimalist, dark mode mobile app map interface. Use as map background reference or placeholder in dashboard live tracking views.

map_ui_light.description: Minimalist, light mode mobile app map interface. Use as map background reference.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette, using Primary Blue (#0A2E6D) for structure/brand and Accent Orange (#FF7A00) for primary actions (Booking/Surge).
Implement Cabinet Grotesk for headings and Satoshi for body text.
For the Customer App, the Map should take up the background (h-screen), with UI layered as a bottom sheet (Glassmorphism).
The Service Selector grid should use tight spacing (gap-3 or gap-4) with clear Lucide icons and small labels. Do NOT use generic centered cards.
Admin/Fleet Dashboards must follow Archetype 4 (Swiss/High-Contrast): dense grids, 1px solid borders, no shadows, maximum data visibility.
Ensure all interactive elements have kebab-case data-testid attributes for testing.
